LanguageData.Artillery_TWAutoMortar.label: auto-mortar
LanguageData.Turret_TW_AutoMortar.label: AutoMortar
LanguageData.Turret_TW_AutoMortar.description: A self-powered, self-loading, automatic mortar. It can hit targets at any distance, over walls, but is quite inaccurate.
LanguageData.TW_Shell_HighExplosive.label: high-explosive shell
LanguageData.Turret_TW_AutoChargeBlaster.label: Auto Charge Blaster
LanguageData.Turret_TW_AutoChargeBlaster.description: A self-powered turret mounted with a charge blaster. It cannot sense targets at very short ranges.
LanguageData.Turret_TW_AutoInferno.label: Inferno cannon
LanguageData.Turret_TW_AutoInferno.description: A self-powered turret mounted with an inferno cannon. It cannot perceive targets at very close range, yet exhibits uncanny intelligence that enables it to fight effectively through smoke and visual obstructions.
LanguageData.TW_Airstrike_Signal_Transmitter.label: Airstrike Signal Transmitter
LanguageData.TW_Airstrike_Signal_Transmitter.descript:
Core mechanoid support equipment. When paired with an active Raid Signal Indicator Terminal, this device continuously transmits encrypted commands to coordinate precision airdrops of airborne-capable mechanoid units at high operational tempo.
Deployed assault mechanoids feature integrated paradrop assault packs and B2000 harassment systems designed to disrupt colonial defenses and fracture combat formations. This creates critical breach opportunities for mechanoid assault waves, serving as a pivotal asset for establishing battlefield dominance through rapid force projection.
LanguageData.Turret_TW_AutoBirgusMortar.label: The Mech Birgus Mortar
LanguageData.Turret_TW_AutoBirgusMortar.description: In protracted engagements, the mechanoid collective observed significant tactical and strategic deficiencies in their Mech birgus units, which struggled to counter long-range enemy artillery. To address this vulnerability, they launched a dedicated research initiative. Through systematic analysis of active mortar deployment patterns and comprehensive evaluation of the Mech birgus's physical resilience, they successfully engineered the specialized Mech Birgus Mortar - purpose-built to neutralize such threats.
